description: All-vs-all identity distance matrix + UPGMA tree to place C6T1A2 within the ZFP subfamily
code:
import requests, numpy as np
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, dendrogram
from scipy.spatial.distance import squareform
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg"); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

C6="MTFIREDDDDQVDDDHDHDHVDGGGSQNSASNITEIVTTPEGENLGEWLSLGLKGDINMPAEEQNSSSRPLHSNNNKVFSCNFCMRKFYSSQALGGHQNAHKREREAARSYHQSHHHRIGFSYTTSLATRSLGIKPHSLVHRPNRERSAMVARFSSSDAINVGVGSVASSWTPFMLEQAVDFYWPGSFRGDLLPKQESSDVKKIDLDLRL"

accs={"ZFP1":"Q42485","ZFP2":"Q39261","ZFP3":"Q39262","ZFP4":"Q39263",
      "ZFP5":"Q39264","ZFP6":"Q39265","ZFP7":"Q39266","ZAT10":"Q96289","ZAT6":"O22533"}
seqs={"C6T1A2":C6}
for n,a in accs.items():
    seqs[n]=requests.get(f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{a}.fasta",timeout=60).text.split("\n",1)[1].replace("\n","")

def nw(a,b,match=2,mismatch=-1,gap=-2):
    n,m=len(a),len(b); H=np.zeros((n+1,m+1))
    for i in range(n+1):H[i][0]=i*gap
    for j in range(m+1):H[0][j]=j*gap
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        ai=a[i-1]
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            s=match if ai==b[j-1] else mismatch
            H[i][j]=max(H[i-1][j-1]+s,H[i-1][j]+gap,H[i][j-1]+gap)
    # identity via traceback
    i,j=n,m;ident=al=0
    while i>0 and j>0:
        s=match if a[i-1]==b[j-1] else mismatch
        if H[i][j]==H[i-1][j-1]+s:
            al+=1; ident+= (a[i-1]==b[j-1]); i-=1;j-=1
        elif H[i][j]==H[i-1][j]+gap: i-=1
        else: j-=1
    return ident/al*100

names=list(seqs)
n=len(names); D=np.zeros((n,n))
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        pid=nw(seqs[names[i]],seqs[names[j]])
        D[i,j]=D[j,i]=100-pid
print("Distance = 100 - %identity")
print("      "+" ".join(f"{x[:5]:>6}" for x in names))
for i in range(n):
    print(f"{names[i]:>6} "+" ".join(f"{D[i,j]:6.1f}" for j in range(n)))

Z=linkage(squareform(D),method="average")
plt.figure(figsize=(8,4))
dendrogram(Z,labels=names,leaf_rotation=45)
plt.title("UPGMA tree of C6T1A2 vs Arabidopsis ZFP subfamily (1 - %identity)")
plt.ylabel("distance (100 - %id)"); plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("zfp_tree.png",dpi=120)
print("\nsaved zfp_tree.png")

# nearest neighbors of C6T1A2
ci=names.index("C6T1A2")
order=sorted([(D[ci,j],names[j]) for j in range(n) if j!=ci])
print("\nC6T1A2 nearest neighbours (dist, %id):")
for d,nm in order: print(f"  {nm:6} dist={d:5.1f}  id={100-d:5.1f}%")
